_comment: REAL live capture, PII-scrubbed. Source: GET https://api.x.ai/v1/api-key with Authorization: Bearer <xai api-key> from a live gm_opencode_seeds seed (provider 'xai', auth type 'api'). UUIDs and redacted key replaced with placeholders; structure + boolean/acl fields verbatim. This is the ONLY identity surface reachable for an xAI *api-key* provider credential: no name, no email, no plan, no usage windows. team_blocked=true here means the team is out of credits (a live 403 'permission-denied' on /v1/models confirmed it), but /v1/api-key itself still returns 200.
name: Default
